🚀 Version 6.2 now finalizes XP redemption mechanics, sacrificial trades, the jury system for the True Ending, and a practical XP Leader endgame.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.3 – The Week 10 Climax, The Rebellion Path, Secret Skill Checks, & The Power Transfer System


🚀 This iteration ties the course structure directly to the Hero’s Journey, integrates a rebellion path against the professor, introduces secret choices, and refines the XP absorption vs. currency system.

📜 1. The Course Structure Now Mirrors the Hero’s Journey

📜 The semester follows a classic narrative arc, with Week 10 serving as the climax.

✔ Weeks 1-3: The Call to Adventure – Students establish their archetype, explore basic skills, and begin minor challenges.
